Records.authors: Usyukina, Natalia I., Davydychev, Andrei I.
Records.description: Two-loop bubble-triangle three-point diagram: one-loop self-energy bubble inserted on the $p_3$ external leg of a one-loop triangle. UV finite but the bubble generates $1/\varepsilon$ pole. The two loop integrations factorize. Result involves $\Phi^{(1)}$ and $\Psi^{(1)}$ functions (polylogarithms up to $\operatorname{Li}_3$).

Results.resultTeXPreview: \frac{M^{-2} \left(-4 H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^-+1}\,;1\right)+4 H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^++1}\,;1\right)+\log ^2\left(-W_1^-\right)-\log ^2\left(-W_1^+\right)\right)}{2 \varepsilon \left(W_1^--W_1^+\right)}+\frac{M^{-2} \left(-6 H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^-+1},\frac{1}{W_1^++1}\,;1\right)+6 H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^++1},\frac{1}{W_1^-+1}\,;1\right)+6 H\left(\frac{1}{W_1^-+1},1,\frac{1}{W_1^++1}\,;1\right)+6 H\left(\frac{1}{W_1^-+1},\frac{1}{W_1^++1},1\,;1\right)-6 H\left(\frac{1}{W_1^++1},1,\frac{1}{W_1^-+1}\,;1\right)-6 H\left(\frac{1}{W_1^++1},\frac{1}{W_1^-+1},1\,;1\right)+24 \log \left(M^2\right) H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^-+1}\,;1\right)+24 i \pi  H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^-+1}\,;1\right)-24 H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^-+1}\,;1\right)+12 H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^-+1},1\,;1\right)+6 H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^-+1},\frac{1}{W_1^-+1}\,;1\right)-6 H\left(\frac{1}{W_1^-+1},1,\frac{1}{W_1^-+1}\,;1\right)-6 H\left(\frac{1}{W_1^-+1},\frac{1}{W_1^-+1},1\,;1\right)-24 \log \left(M^2\right) H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^++1}\,;1\right)-24 i \pi  H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^++1}\,;1\right)+24 H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^++1}\,;1\right)-12 H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^++1},1\,;1\right)-6 H\left(0,\frac{1}{W_1^++1},\frac{1}{W_1^++1}\,;1\right)+6 H\left(\frac{1}{W_1^++1},1,\frac{1}{W_1^++1}\,;1\right)+6 H\left(\frac{1}{W_1^++1},\frac{1}{W_1^++1},1\,;1\right)-6 \log \left(M^2\right) \log ^2\left(-W_1^-\right)-6 \zeta(2) \log \left(-W_1^-\right)-\log ^3\left(-W_1^-\right)-6 i \pi  \log ^2\left(-W_1^-\right)+6 \log ^2\left(-W_1^-\right)-\pi ^2 \log \left(-W_1^-\right)+6 \log \left(M^2\right) \log ^2\left(-W_1^+\right)+6 \zeta(2) \log \left(-W_1^+\right)+\log ^3\left(-W_1^+\right)+6 i \pi  \log ^2\left(-W_1^+\right)-6 \log ^2\left(-W_1^+\right)+\pi ^2 \log \left(-W_1^+\right)\right)}{6 \left(W_1^--W_1^+\right)}+O\left(\varepsilon^1\right)
